ddls:
CREATE TABLE "account_types" (
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each account type */,
  "account_name" TEXT /* Name of the account type (e.g., Primetimers Checking) */,
  "product_category" TEXT /* Category of the financial product (e.g., Checking, Savings) */,
  "account_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the account type */,
  "minimum_opening_balance" TEXT /* Minimum balance required to open the account */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Status of the account type (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_rates" (
  "interest_rate_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest rate entry */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account type */,
  "interest_rate" TEXT /* Interest rate value */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate starts */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the interest rate was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("interest_rate_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_rates_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "annual_percentage_yields" (
  "apy_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each APY entry */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account type */,
  "apy" TEXT /* Annual Percentage Yield value */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the APY starts */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the APY ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the APY was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("apy_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_annual_percentage_yields_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "minimum_balances" (
  "min_balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each minimum balance entry */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account type */,
  "min_balance" TEXT /* Minimum balance value */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the minimum balance requirement starts */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the minimum balance requirement ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the minimum balance requirement was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("min_balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_minimum_balances_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_payment_schedules" (
  "payment_schedule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest payment schedule */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account type */,
  "payment_frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of interest payment (e.g., Monthly, Quarterly) */,
  "effective_start_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment schedule starts */,
  "effective_end_date" TEXT /* Date when the payment schedule ends */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the payment schedule was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_schedule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_payment_schedules_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "accounts" (
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer account */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer who owns the account */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the type of account */,
  "balance" TEXT /* Current balance in the account */,
  "opened_date" TEXT /* Date the account was opened */,
  "account_status" TEXT /* Current status of the account (e.g., Active, Closed) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the account was last updated */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the account is managed */,
  "account_number" TEXT /* Unique account number for the customer */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("account_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_accounts_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "customer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "contact_number" TEXT /* Contact number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Physical address of the customer */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the customer */,
  "gender" TEXT /* Gender of the customer */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the customer account was created */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the customer information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer account */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., Deposit, Withdrawal) */,
  "amount" TEXT /* Amount of the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date the transaction occurred */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the transaction */,
  "transaction_description" TEXT /* Description of the transaction */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the transaction was processed */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the transaction was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "interest_payments" (
  "payment_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each interest payment */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer account */,
  "payment_amount" TEXT /* Amount of the interest payment */,
  "payment_date" TEXT /* Date the interest payment was made */,
  "reference_number" TEXT /* Unique reference number for the interest payment */,
  "payment_description" TEXT /* Description of the interest payment */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the interest payment was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("payment_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_interest_payments_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "account_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the customer account */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., Low Balance, Account Status Change) */,
  "alert_message" TEXT /* Message of the alert */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date the alert was sent */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., Sent, Read) */,
  "branch_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the branch where the alert was sent */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the alert was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_alerts_account_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_id") REFERENCES accounts ("account_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "account_products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "account_type_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the account type */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "product_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "product_status" TEXT /* Status of the product (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_account_products_account_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("account_type_id") REFERENCES account_types ("account_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_offers" (
  "offer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each offer */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "offer_description" TEXT /* Description of the offer */,
  "offer_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the offer */,
  "offer_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the offer */,
  "offer_status" TEXT /* Status of the offer (e.g., Active, Expired) */,
  "offer_code" TEXT /* Unique code for the offer */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the offer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("offer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_offers_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES account_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "product_educational_content" (
  "content_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each piece of content */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the product */,
  "content_title" TEXT /* Title of the educational content */,
  "content_description" TEXT /* Description of the content */,
  "content_link" TEXT /* Link to the content */,
  "content_status" TEXT /* Status of the content (e.g., Active, Inactive) */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the content was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("content_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_product_educational_content_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES account_products ("product_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role (e.g., Admin, Customer Service) */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  "role_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the role */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the role was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the user information was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_users_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)
